name: Telegram bot read commands
description: Read-only /stats, /top, and /budget commands with current-user household/group scope options and Vietnamese-ready finance summaries.

done: Added /stats, /top, /budget commands with personal + active household scope options.
Worker-safe finance renderers (finance-text.ts) and keyboard builders (keyboards.ts) avoid importing Hono handlers.
Scope gated by listActiveHouseholdIdsForUser; inaccessible households rejected.
Shared read-scope.ts helper extracted after review to dedupe stats/top scope parsing.
Invalid budget scope skipped with warning instead of misleading 0% fallback.
Oracle review approved with 2 MEDIUM findings fixed (invalid budget handling, scope helper extraction).
verification: Oracle review approved; 112c cleared to start.

notes: No member breakdown in bot MVP. Commands are read-only.
